note: Curated anime-source candidates for Opal. IMPORTANT: the FMHY/aggregator anime lists contain 60+ ad-supported streaming SPA sites (Miruro-clones, Aniwave-clones, etc.) that rotate domains monthly and do NOT fit Opal's model — Opal streams anime via torrents (nyaa/shanaproject/nekobt, see torrent-sources.json), the AllAnime/AnimePahe scrapers (already wired), and metadata via Jikan/AniList. Those SPA sites are deliberately EXCLUDED as non-durable. Listed here are only sources with a real API or that fit an existing scraper engine. Deduped against allanime, animepahe, anime-kitsu, and the dooplay/animestream engines Opal already has.

api_backed.name: AnimeParadise
api_backed.notes: Open JSON API backend — cleanest integration candidate of the anime set.

api_backed.name: AnimeOnsen
api_backed.notes: Documented v4 API; requires a client id/secret (like a keyed plugin). Dubbed-heavy catalog.

api_backed.name: Miruro
api_backed.notes: Rides a Consumet/AniList backend; if it exposes a stable proxy, one adapter could cover several front-ends.

excluded_streaming_spas.reason: 60+ ad-streaming web UIs (e.g. aniwave/hianime clones) with monthly domain churn and no stable API. Not durable as endpoint plugins; Opal covers anime streaming via torrents + AllAnime/AnimePahe scrapers instead.

manga_note: Anime-adjacent manga sources (mangafire, weebcentral, manganato) are in reading-sources.json.

metadata_and_quality.name: SeaDex
metadata_and_quality.api: https://releases.moe/api/ (public JSON — best-release recommendations per AniList id)
metadata_and_quality.notes: LEGAL metadata: tells you the BEST torrent release for a title, keyed by AniList id. Pairs perfectly with Opal's AniList data — 'recommended release' hint. Top pick of the anime tools.

metadata_and_quality.name: trace.moe
metadata_and_quality.notes: LEGAL API: identify an anime from a screenshot. Niche but a nice 'what is this frame' feature.

metadata_and_quality.name: Kitsu
metadata_and_quality.notes: LEGAL metadata/tracking API — an alternative/supplement to Jikan+AniList. Opal has the anime-kitsu Stremio addon but not the Kitsu metadata API itself.

metadata_and_quality.name: Kurozora
metadata_and_quality.notes: All-in-one anime/manga/music/games tracker with an API. Legal metadata.
